items.statcast_observation: Carter Jensen produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 109.2 mph at a 9.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 2, TB 1. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 1 walk. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 109.2 mph.
items.title: Royals at Rays Recap
